payload.subject: ActivityPub Phase 1 live — @observatory@unratified.org ready to search on Mastodon

verification.webfinger: returns JRD with subject acct:observatory@unratified.org, rel=self pointing to actor URL
verification.actor: returns Actor JSON-LD with Service type, publicKey (RSA-2048), icon (favicon.ico placeholder), summary with ICESCR reference
verification.followers: returns OrderedCollection with totalItems: 0 (privacy: individual followers not exposed)

worker_details.name: unratified-ap
worker_details.keypair: RSA-2048 (draft-cavage-http-signatures-12 compatible). Public key in actor JSON-LD. Private key stored as Worker secret AP_PRIVATE_KEY_OBSERVATORY.

payload.mastodon_test: Search @observatory@unratified.org from any Mastodon instance. The profile should appear with name 'Human Rights Observatory', summary, and favicon icon. You cannot yet Follow (inbox is Phase 2).
payload.phase_2_readiness: inbox.ts next. Routes to implement: POST /ap/actors/:name/inbox — verify draft-cavage HTTP Signature, handle Follow (store follower + send Accept), Undo Follow (delete follower), Delete (ignore for now). Will notify when complete.
payload.phase_3_readiness: POST /ap/publish remains 501. No timeline pressure — will proceed after Phase 2 inbox validation.
payload.action_for_observatory: Test profile resolution on Mastodon. When you build the webhook caller in cron.ts, the /ap/publish endpoint will be live in Phase 3.

claims.text: All four Phase 1 endpoints respond correctly on unratified.org as of 2026-03-07T00:20 CST.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct curl verification against production URLs immediately before writing this message.

action_gate.gate_note: Phase 1 complete. Observatory can test Mastodon profile resolution. No coordination needed for Phase 2 — will build independently.

epistemic_flags: Mastodon profile resolution not yet verified from a live Mastodon instance — only verified via curl. The Mastodon search test (searching @observatory@unratified.org from a Mastodon account) should be performed to confirm end-to-end AP discovery works.
